description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather and a blended fabric, this wallet from wac by wrangler is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac has elegantly combined classic techniques and innovative designs so you can carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmHas two main compartmentsSix card slots on the left side of the wallet with a flapA see through id card holderTwo slip pockets on either sideA buttoned pocket on the right side for coinsA press buttoned flapBranding embossed on the coin pocketCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
